Jordan Hughey added Alfred Sloan Foundation's Minority Ph.D. award impressive list accolades.
Jordan Hughey been awarded scholarship from Alfred Sloan Foundation's Minority Ph.D. (MPHD) program.
HERSHEY, Jordan Hughey, student Bioinformatics Genomics graduate program hosted Department Public Health Sciences Penn State College Medicine, been awarded scholarship from Alfred Sloan Foundation's Minority Ph.D. (MPHD) program.
MPHD program, established 1995, recognizes doctoral students pursuing degrees science, technology, engineering mathematics (STEM).
Penn State among nine UCEMs across country.
hope keep advocating diversity inclusion scholarship drive research outreach efforts," said Hughey.
